emails.subject: Re: EMP Echo
emails.body: Re: EMP Echo Sorry I can't help. Also, you know that legal will be out of the office from Wed. afternoon through the end of the week. Are there any pressing items? Sara Laurel Adams 04/04/2000 11:50 AM

emails.subject: Re: EMP Echo
emails.body: Re: EMP Echo Sara, Are you going to be handling the opening of a bond custody account? Shari had reviewed a bunch of paperwork related to opening one at Bank of New York, and Carol St. Clair had done some work on opening one with Chase Tx. Are you at all familiar with either of these. I think we are meeting at 4pm at Sheila's desk to discuss these agreements, although based on your email, I am guessing you won't be able to come down....
